title: mo:os Superset Ontology
description: Complete categorical ontology for the mo:os Universal Graph Model. All objects are containers, all relationships are wires, all changes are morphisms.

axioms.name: No_Meta_Only_Recursive
axioms.statement: Every entity in the system is a container identified by a URN. There is no metadata layer — only containers referencing containers via wires.

axioms.name: Code_Is_Axiomatic
axioms.statement: Code is loaded into semantic folders as atomic morphisms. Code is never stored in state_payload. Binding code to graph metadata causes structural binding loss.

axioms.name: DB_Is_Truth
axioms.statement: The morphism_log is the single source of truth. containers and wires tables are materialized caches. Any state can be reconstructed by replaying morphism_log.

axioms.name: Hypergraph_Superposition
axioms.statement: The database stores THE graph — a superposition of all projected graphs. Multiple wires between the same (A,B) pair via different ports is the general case. Queries collapse the superposition by selecting edge types.
axioms.formal: G_stored = ⋃_{p ∈ Ports} G_p; UNIQUE(source_urn, source_port, target_urn, target_port)

axioms.name: Discovery_Retrieval_Duality
axioms.statement: The gap between potential edges (n² × |P_s| × |P_t|) and actual edges (k) IS the system's knowledge. Discovery cost is O(|E_scope| × c_index). Retrieval cost is O(k+1). The D/R ratio per sub-category is a first-class optimization metric.
axioms.formal: Knowledge = n² × |P_s| × |P_t| - k; D/R = Cost_discovery / Cost_retrieval

objects.name: AuthUser
objects.description: Authenticated user — a container whose morphisms grant access edges. No special ontological status.

objects.name: AppAdmin
objects.description: Application administrator — AuthUser with elevated OWNS edges to system containers.

objects.name: SuperAdmin
objects.description: Root administrator — AppAdmin with transitive OWNS over all containers.

objects.name: AppTemplate
objects.description: Template container — defines a reusable subgraph pattern. Instantiation = ADD + LINK morphism sequence.

objects.name: NodeContainer
objects.description: General-purpose container — the default object in C. Payload in state_payload JSONB.

objects.name: AgnosticModel
objects.description: LLM/ML model container — provider-agnostic. Model identity is a URN; provider config lives in state_payload.

objects.name: SystemTool
objects.description: Tool container — discovered via graph traversal, exposed via MCP protocol surface. Endpoint + params in state_payload.

objects.name: UI_Lens
objects.description: UI rendering surface — functor output mapping containers × wires to React component tree.

objects.name: RuntimeSurface
objects.description: Execution surface — HTTP/WS/MCP endpoint. Tools wire to RuntimeSurface to become executable.

objects.name: ComputeResource
objects.description: GPU device, Docker container, thread pool, or VM — a schedulable resource container.

objects.name: ProtocolAdapter
objects.description: WS channel, MCP session, gRPC stream, HTTP endpoint — a routable communication container.

objects.name: InfraService
objects.description: Postgres instance, disk volume, network segment — a persistable infrastructure container.

objects.name: MemoryStore
objects.description: Vector embedding store, context window, conversation history — an ephemeral or persistent memory container.

morphisms.name: CAN_HYDRATE
morphisms.description: Hydration permission — declared transitivity controlled by manifest/wire_config.

morphisms.name: PRE_FLIGHT_CONFIG
morphisms.description: Runtime configuration morphism — sets initial state before activation.

morphisms.name: SYNC_ACTIVE_STATE
morphisms.description: State synchronization — UI or runtime surface pushes current state back to container.

morphisms.name: ADD_NODE_CONTAINER
morphisms.description: Create a new container and wire it into the ownership tree.

morphisms.name: LINK_NODES
morphisms.description: General-purpose wiring — creates an edge with specified port types.

morphisms.name: UPDATE_NODE_KERNEL
morphisms.description: Update container state_payload — kernel-level state change.

morphisms.name: DELETE_EDGE
morphisms.description: Remove a wire. Container persists. May create orphan nodes (visible in containers, invisible to traversal).

morphisms.name: CAN_SCHEDULE
morphisms.description: Workload allocation — kernel or admin schedules work to a compute resource.

morphisms.name: CAN_ROUTE
morphisms.description: Transport selection — protocol adapter routes traffic to any target container.

morphisms.name: CAN_PERSIST
morphisms.description: Storage routing — any container can persist state through an infrastructure service.

morphisms.name: CAN_FEDERATE
morphisms.description: Cross-instance communication — enables morphism bundle exchange between mo:os instances.

morphisms.name: CAN_FORK
morphisms.description: Branch parallel exploration — fork active state graph into GPU VRAM for parallel DAG scoring.

functors.name: FileSystem
functors.description: Import functor — reads manifest.yaml and creates/reconciles LINK morphisms in wires table.

functors.name: UI_Lens
functors.description: Render functor — maps containers and wires to XYFlow nodes/edges in React.

functors.name: Embedding
functors.description: Embed functor — maps container payloads to pgvector embeddings. Output in container_embeddings, not state_payload.

functors.name: Structure
functors.description: GPU pre-analysis functor — adjacency matrix ops, spectral analysis, DAG compression before LLM calls.

functors.name: Benchmark
functors.description: Cross-provider comparison functor — structure-preserving map from provider categories to standard evaluation category.

systems.name: RootContainer
systems.description: Top-level container — root of all ownership trees. Every container is transitively owned by RootContainer.

systems.name: MainLoop
systems.description: Kernel event loop — Event→Route→Dispatch→Transform→Commit pipeline. Reads categories from graph, has no business logic.

systems.name: RestingStateDB
systems.description: Postgres ground truth — morphism_log (truth), containers/wires (caches), container_embeddings (functor output).

systems.name: ActiveStateGraph
systems.description: Live hypergraph superposition — all projected graphs coexist. Queries collapse superposition by port type selection.

invariant_morphisms.note: All 12 superset morphisms above decompose into these 4 invariant natural transformations.
